name: create_issue
description: Open a new issue in a repository with a title and body

name: merge_pull_request
description: Merge an open pull request into its base branch

name: list_commits
description: List recent commits on a branch

name: run_query
description: Execute a read-only SQL SELECT statement and return rows

name: list_tables
description: List all tables in the connected database schema

name: explain_query
description: Return the query planner execution plan for a SQL statement

name: read_file
description: Read the contents of a file from disk

name: write_file
description: Create or overwrite a file with the given contents

name: search_files
description: Find files whose contents match a regular expression

name: s3_upload
description: Upload an object to an S3 bucket

name: lambda_invoke
description: Invoke a Lambda function with a JSON payload

name: ec2_describe_instances
description: List EC2 virtual machine instances and their state

name: post_message
description: Send a message to a Slack channel

name: upload_snippet
description: Share a code snippet or file in a Slack channel

name: get_tiny_image
description: Return a small sample logo image encoded as base64

name: transcribe_audio
description: Convert spoken words in an audio file into text

name: create_event
description: Schedule a new calendar event with a start and end time

name: list_events
description: List upcoming events on the calendar
